nasb.text: He leveled a path for His anger; He did not spare their soul from death, But gave over their life to the plague,

esv.text: He made a path for his anger; he did not spare them from death, but gave their lives over to the plague.

cnv.text: 他為自己的怒氣修平了路， 不惜使他們死亡， 把他們的性命交給瘟疫。

ccb.text: 祂的怒气尽发， 使他们被瘟疫吞噬，难逃一死。

csbs.text: 他为自己的怒气修平了路， 不惜让他们死亡， 把他们的性命交给瘟疫。
